subcodes.first_line: Verily, thy Lord, the Most High, the Most Exalted, doth call from this Most Glorious Horizon unto all who dwell in earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان ربک العلی الاعلی من هذا الافق الابهی ینادی کل من فی الارض و السما بان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
